arts.ttl: “Negotiations are underway” – Possible Chelsea boost as Man United “concrete” transfer target named
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly admirers of Bayer Leverkusen striker Victor Boniface but have not yet had any talks over a transfer. The Nigeria international has shone during his time in the Bundesliga, but it remains to be seen what could happen next for him as he seemingly attracts interest from the Premier League. arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'willing to pay €60m' for Paris Saint-Germain defender
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly prepared to pay as much as €60m (£49.69m) to sign one of Paris Saint-Germain's key defenders in 2025.

arts.ttl: Opinion: Cole Palmer’s stats prove he’s not been quiet whilst being ‘quiet’
arts.sum: When teams started to focus on man marking Cole Palmer this season, that is when you know how serious of a player this guy is (as if we didn’t already know). Palmer just picked up yet another award this week, and he will soon have to buy a bigger house to put them all in. […]

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca believes €100m flop will come good
arts.sum: There have been reports for months that Chelsea will try to sell or loan out Mudryk in the January transfer window after two disastrous years at Stamford Bridge. Chelsea are refusing to sell Mykhailo Mudryk and actually believe that the €100 million flop will still come good.
